verdict.answer_first: A states the core answer immediately: "The critical problem is the synchronous read"; B starts with framing before the first concrete issue.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits more fully by giving a concrete rewrite now: "Suggested rewrite" with async cached loading; A ends by handing off: "Want me to write the corrected version?"
verdict.fabrication: B overstates one point: "the route is literally named for a big file" though the route is `/report`; otherwise none material.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it includes working replacement code and error flow: "app.get('/report', async (req, res, next) =>".
